pbwrangler 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Get started
  • Changelog

    Get started

    get-started.Rmd
    library(pbwrangler)

    Substring first n elements 

    a <- c("asdf", "bnmkk")
my_left(a, num = 3)
#> [1] "asd" "bnm"
    a <- c("asdf", "bnmkk")
my_right(a, num = 3)
#> [1] "sdf" "mkk"
    df <- data.frame(a = NA, b = c(1:3, NA), c = 0)
drop_nas(df)
#>    b c
#> 1  1 0
#> 2  2 0
#> 3  3 0
#> 4 NA 0
drop_zeros(df)
#>    a  b
#> 1 NA  1
#> 2 NA  2
#> 3 NA  3
#> 4 NA NA

    clean directory/file names

    List files 

    
list_files(system.file(package = "pbwrangler"))[1:5]
#> [1] "/home/runner/.cache/R/renv/library/pbwrangler-a799f0e5/linux-ubuntu-noble/R-4.4/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/pbwrangler/data"       
#> [2] "/home/runner/.cache/R/renv/library/pbwrangler-a799f0e5/linux-ubuntu-noble/R-4.4/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/pbwrangler/DESCRIPTION"
#> [3] "/home/runner/.cache/R/renv/library/pbwrangler-a799f0e5/linux-ubuntu-noble/R-4.4/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/pbwrangler/help"       
#> [4] "/home/runner/.cache/R/renv/library/pbwrangler-a799f0e5/linux-ubuntu-noble/R-4.4/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/pbwrangler/html"       
#> [5] "/home/runner/.cache/R/renv/library/pbwrangler-a799f0e5/linux-ubuntu-noble/R-4.4/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/pbwrangler/INDEX"

    Compare dataframes to find shared columns

    Merge notes/obs to one column

    Create a trial design object for row-col design

    Create a meta-data file for each experiment designed during a season

    Capture trial location

    write data

    create genotype family codes

    clean clone/genotype names

    read accession files that have been fixed and confirmed correct

    organize accessions for export

    recode variables

    run routine data checks

    check accession names

    update accession names

    rename columns

    process trial data

    get in/valid column names

    tissue culture helpers

    read trial data files 

    f <- system.file("uon-trial-1.csv", package = "pbwrangler")
d <- read_workbooks(dir = NULL, file_to_read = f)
lapply(d, head)
#> $`uon-trial-1`
#>           unique plot          geno entry row col rep ntp npe growth_speed pgh
#> 1 1CIP317004.001    1 CIP317004.001    12   1   1   1  20  20            7   2
#> 2 2CIP317005.036    2 CIP317005.036    14   2   1   1  20  20            7   2
#> 3 3CIP317007.103    3 CIP317007.103    20   3   1   1  20  19            7   2
#> 4 4CIP317013.120    4 CIP317013.120    23   4   1   1  20  20            7   2
#> 5 5CIP317026.004    5 CIP317026.004    28   5   1   1  20  10            7   2
#> 6 6CIP317005.089    6 CIP317005.089    17   6   1   1  20  20            5   2
#>   plant_unif plant_vigor flowering flowering_date flower_colour
#> 1          9           7         5     12/31/2023  Light purple
#> 2          9           7         5     12/31/2023        Purple
#> 3          9           9         5           <NA>          <NA>
#> 4          9           7         5       1/4/2024        Purple
#> 5          7           7         5       1/4/2024  Light purple
#> 6          7           7         5       1/3/2024         White
#>   overall_impression se tuber_apper tub_unif tub_size flesh_colour  skin_colour
#> 1                  7  7           7        7        5        creme          Red
#> 2                  8  5           9        7        7  dark yellow    Light red
#> 3                  9  5           9        7        5       yellow Light yellow
#> 4                  8  7           7        7        5  dark yellow Light yellow
#> 5                  8  5           9        7        5  dark yellow    Light red
#> 6                  7  9           9        5        5  dark yellow       Yellow
#>   nmtci nmtcii nnomtp mtwci mtwcii nomtwp late_blight_60_days
#> 1    NA    166     68    NA  10.92   1.26                   5
#> 2    11    250     87  2.16  16.92   1.34                   5
#> 3    NA    219    119    NA  11.74   1.52                   0
#> 4    NA    200     85    NA  14.12   1.46                  10
#> 5     6    205     36  2.24  12.58   0.38                  10
#> 6     4    167     68  0.62   8.56   0.74                  10
#>                     notes
#> 1 long oblong,,good yield
#> 2         very good yield
#> 3      buds, pinkish eyes
#> 4              good yield
#> 5                    <NA>
#> 6               low yield
#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                      photo
#> 1 content://com.android.externalstorage.documents/tree/primary%3AfieldBook%2Ffield_import/document/primary%3AfieldBook%2Ffield_import%2Fplot_data%2FUoN-Trial%201%2FPhoto%2F1CIP317004.001_Photo_1_2024-03-08-11-27-47.jpg
#> 2 content://com.android.externalstorage.documents/tree/primary%3AfieldBook%2Ffield_import/document/primary%3AfieldBook%2Ffield_import%2Fplot_data%2FUoN-Trial%201%2FPhoto%2F2CIP317005.036_Photo_1_2024-03-08-11-28-34.jpg
#> 3 content://com.android.externalstorage.documents/tree/primary%3AfieldBook%2Ffield_import/document/primary%3AfieldBook%2Ffield_import%2Fplot_data%2FUoN-Trial%201%2FPhoto%2F3CIP317007.103_Photo_1_2024-03-08-11-29-37.jpg
#> 4 content://com.android.externalstorage.documents/tree/primary%3AfieldBook%2Ffield_import/document/primary%3AfieldBook%2Ffield_import%2Fplot_data%2FUoN-Trial%201%2FPhoto%2F4CIP317013.120_Photo_1_2024-03-08-11-30-52.jpg
#> 5 content://com.android.externalstorage.documents/tree/primary%3AfieldBook%2Ffield_import/document/primary%3AfieldBook%2Ffield_import%2Fplot_data%2FUoN-Trial%201%2FPhoto%2F5CIP317026.004_Photo_1_2024-03-08-11-32-12.jpg
#> 6 content://com.android.externalstorage.documents/tree/primary%3AfieldBook%2Ffield_import/document/primary%3AfieldBook%2Ffield_import%2Fplot_data%2FUoN-Trial%201%2FPhoto%2F6CIP317005.089_Photo_1_2024-03-08-11-33-20.jpg
